H

hashCode() - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.atom.TermAtom
 
Hedge - Class in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data
A Hedge is a sequence of TermNodes.
Hedge() - Constructor for class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.Hedge
 
HedgeVar - Class in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.atom
A hedge variable can be substituted by a single TermNode or a hedge which is represented by a TermNode with a null-atom TermNode.isNullAtom().
HedgeVar(String) - Constructor for class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.atom.HedgeVar
